description_long: This is a robust, rectangular-headed hammer with a dark metallic head, reinforced by two wide, brown metal bands that wrap around its length and are secured with large rivets. The head is solid and blocky, with slightly beveled edges and a smooth, slightly glossy finish, suggesting durability and strength. The handle is cylindrical, made of dark wood with a visible grain pattern, and capped at both ends with metallic bands for added reinforcement and grip. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the handle inserted deeply into the head for stability. The hammer's design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. Its size and construction suggest it is intended for heavy-duty tasks, possibly in construction or demolition within an urban environment.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed hammer with a dark metal head reinforced by brown bands and a sturdy wooden handle capped with metal. The design is functional and robust, suitable for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed head-on, showing the square face of the head and the cylindrical handle extending downward, with the brown bands just visible at the edges.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the full length of the rectangular head, the two brown metal bands with rivets, and the wood-grain handle capped with metal at the base.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite square face of the head, with the handle centered and the brown bands barely visible at the sides.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the rectangular head, brown bands, and the full wooden handle with metal end caps.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with visible grain, cylindrical shape, capped with metallic bands at both ends for reinforcement and grip
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, solid metal with two wide brown metal bands and large rivets, flat striking faces on both ends
